mapper.insert: INSERT INTO STUDENTS (student_id, password, name, grade, class_name, student_number, register_year, total_coupon, total_point) VALUES (#{studentId}, #{password}, #{name}, #{grade}, #{className}, #{studentNumber}, CURDATE(), 0, 30000)
mapper.select: SELECT s.total_point + COALESCE(SUM(MY_VALUE.value), 0) AS total_asset FROM STUDENTS s LEFT JOIN ( SELECT o.student_id, o.stock_no, SUM( CASE WHEN o.order_content = 'BUY' THEN o.amount ELSE -o.amount END ) * COALESCE( ( SELECT recent_o.order_point FROM ORDERS recent_o WHERE recent_o.stock_no = o.stock_no AND recent_o.order_state = 'MATCHED' ORDER BY recent_o.order_date DESC LIMIT 1 ), st.publication_point ) AS value FROM ORDERS o JOIN STOCKS st ON o.stock_no = st.stock_no WHERE o.order_state = 'MATCHED' GROUP BY o.student_id, o.stock_no, st.publication_point ) MY_VALUE ON s.student_id = MY_VALUE.student_id WHERE s.student_id = #{studentId} GROUP BY s.student_id, s.total_point
SELECT total_point FROM students WHERE student_id = #{studentId}

SELECT COALESCE(SUM(stock_profit), 0) AS totalProfit FROM ( SELECT ( SUM( CASE WHEN o.order_content = 'BUY' THEN o.amount ELSE -o.amount END ) * COALESCE( ( SELECT recent_o.order_point FROM ORDERS recent_o WHERE recent_o.stock_no = o.stock_no AND recent_o.order_state = 'MATCHED' ORDER BY recent_o.order_date DESC LIMIT 1 ), st.publication_point ) ) - SUM( CASE WHEN o.order_content = 'BUY' THEN o.order_point * o.amount ELSE 0 END ) AS stock_profit FROM ORDERS o JOIN STOCKS st ON o.stock_no = st.stock_no WHERE o.student_id = #{studentId} AND o.order_state = 'MATCHED' GROUP BY o.stock_no, st.publication_point ) AS PROFIT
SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_coupon FROM coupon_purchase WHERE purchase_state = 'NOT_USED' AND student_id = #{studentId}
SELECT DISTINCT stock_no FROM ORDERS WHERE student_id = #{studentId} AND order_state = 'MATCHED'

SELECT COALESCE( ( ( SUM( CASE WHEN o.order_content = 'BUY' THEN o.amount ELSE -o.amount END ) * ( SELECT COALESCE( ( SELECT recent_o.order_point FROM ORDERS recent_o WHERE recent_o.stock_no = #{stockNo} AND recent_o.order_state = 'MATCHED' ORDER BY recent_o.order_date DESC LIMIT 1 ), st.publication_point ) FROM STOCKS st WHERE st.stock_no = o.stock_no ) ) - SUM( CASE WHEN o.order_content = 'BUY' THEN o.order_point * o.amount ELSE 0 END ) ), 0 ) AS profit FROM ORDERS o WHERE o.student_id = #{studentId} AND o.stock_no = #{stockNo} AND o.order_state = 'MATCHED' GROUP BY o.stock_no

SELECT order_no AS "orderNo", order_content AS "orderContent", order_point AS "orderPoint", amount AS "amount", order_date AS "orderDate", order_state AS "orderState" FROM orders WHERE student_id = #{studentId} AND stock_no = #{stockNo} AND order_state ='PENDING' ORDER BY order_date ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE students SET total_point = total_point + #{totalPoint} WHERE student_id = #{studentId}
UPDATE students SET total_point = total_point - #{totalPoint} WHERE student_id = #{studentId}
UPDATE students SET total_point = total_point - #{point}, total_coupon = total_coupon + 1 WHERE student_id = #{studentId} AND total_point >= #{point}
mapper.select: SELECT name, purchase_point FROM coupon_purchase WHERE purchase_state = 'NOT_USED' AND student_id = #{studentId}
